race.comment: Good races with plenty of form to go on but GARCON D'ESPOIR (1) is desperately close to a win. Has raced here at both runs this time in and beaten a nose at both. Fitter again and should go close. TASSIE POWER (6) was a winner two back then tackled a Class 6 last time and wasn't disgraced. Drops a couple of grades and can immediately bounce back. SIMPLY DEEP (5) is racing in super consistent form and looks set to go close again. WILD DANCER (8) has won two of last three and is another who should run well again. BILLIE THE GREAT (9) is racing well over shorter races and must come into consideration over this longer journey.
